snps.effect_template: HFE C282Y mutation. Homozygous carriers have high risk of iron overload.
HFE H63D variant. Associated with iron overload risk.
HFE S65C variant. Rare mutation affecting iron metabolism.
TFR2 transferrin receptor 2. Iron sensing and hepcidin regulation.
TMPRSS6 transmembrane protease serine 6. Hepcidin repression and iron absorption.
BMP2 bone morphogenetic protein 2. Indirect effects on iron metabolism signaling.
HFE2/HJV hemojuvelin. Hepcidin regulation and primary hemochromatosis.

recommendation_template: If carrier: monitor serum ferritin and transferrin saturation periodically. Iron overload is treatable with phlebotomy if caught early.

studies.title: A novel MHC class I-like gene is mutated in patients with hereditary haemochromatosis
studies.finding: HFE C282Y (rs1800562) homozygosity causes majority of hereditary hemochromatosis

studies.title: Genome-wide association study identifies variants associated with serum ferritin levels
studies.finding: Identified multiple iron metabolism loci including TFR2, TMPRSS6, BMP2, and HFE2/HJV
